name: A Large Language Model-Driven Agent-Based Modeling Framework with Multi-Round Communication for Simulating Vaccine Opinion Dynamics (2607.07387)

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Recently, LLMs have been utilized in various applications of computational social science and provide the possibility to integrate such models into agent-based modeling to explore cognitive processes. This study introduces a framework that integrates an LLM (Qwen3-8B) into ABM to investigate vaccination opinion dynamics. The framework reproduces the non-linear behavior patterns of social influence observed in existing research, demonstrating validity and potential to reach level 3 validation of
